name: Happle Bagel Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
1. Take one round apple slice.
2. Place the apple slice on a cheese slice and then on a bagel.
3. Put the assembled sandwich in an oven preheated to 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 5-10 minutes.
4. Make sure to watch it so you don't burn it.
5. When the cheese starts to melt, remove the sandwich from the oven. Enjoy!
